summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 3+4 testing of Syroce CRM. Backend API is 100% functional with all JWT auth, versioning, SEO, image upload, and multi-page export features working. Frontend shows intermittent loading issues but core functionality works when loaded.

ui_bugs.issue: Intermittent blank screen loading - page sometimes loads correctly showing dashboard, sometimes shows blank screen

integration_issues.issue: Inconsistent page rendering - authentication and dashboard work when loaded, but loading is unreliable

passed_tests: Backend API: JWT Authentication (register/login admin@syroce.com / admin123)
Backend API: Auth check returns has_users: true
Backend API: Image upload accepts files (POST /api/upload)
Backend API: Template cloning from project (POST /api/templates/clone-from-project/{id})
Backend API: SEO fields in projects (PUT /api/projects/{id} with seo, language, export_mode)
Backend API: Multi-page export (POST /api/projects/{id}/export with export_mode=multi)
Backend API: Dashboard stats (30 templates seeded correctly)
Backend API: Templates CRUD with 30 templates and category filtering
Backend API: Projects CRUD with Phase 4 enhancements
Frontend: Login with admin@syroce.com / admin123 (when page loads)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with correct stats (1 Müşteri, 3 Proje, 30 Şablon)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (34/34 tests passed - all Phase 3+4 features working)
success_percentage.frontend: 70% (core functionality works but intermittent loading issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend loading inconsistency - page sometimes loads correctly showing dashboard with Turkish UI and correct stats, but sometimes shows blank screen. All backend APIs are 100% functional. Check for JavaScript loading errors, network timeouts, or React rendering issues.
